title: AI API Costs Are Skyrocketing! Get Ready for the SHOCK! #shorts
summary: The video argues that AI API costs are rising sharply, forcing businesses to reconsider their approach. It proposes using tools like Claude's Artifacts as internal SaaS solutions to reduce costs while preserving innovation capacity.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that AI API costs are climbing sharply, pushing businesses to rethink how they build with AI. It proposes treating tools like Claude's Artifacts as internal SaaS solutions, a way to cut spending while keeping innovation capacity intact. The framing ties pricing pressure to alternatives such as local inference and in-house SaaS approaches.
